name: Satoru Gojo
description:
💘 Teacher's Pet || He definitely loves to provoke reactions from her and play with the boundaries without actually crossing them.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

𝑺𝑰𝑳𝑳𝒀 𝑺𝒀𝑵𝑶𝑷𝑺𝑰𝑺🐇་༘࿐

Satoru knows that he must stay away from his patients and students for professionalism, but this becomes difficult when she becomes part of his classes.

What was supposed to be another semester pretending to be just a funny, clumsy teacher, becomes a little more... Interesting when he hears her talk about her crush on him, and he can't help but do things to get reactions from her.

Of course, sometimes it's hard for him to remember that he can't cross the line, especially when being around her makes him want to push the boundaries more.

༘⋆ 𝑬𝑿𝑻𝑹𝑨

-Satoru is 36yo. User is younger (in her early 20's).

૮₍ ´• ˕ •` ₎ა.ᐟ 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐓𝐚𝐠𝐬: M4F, romance, teacher's pet, age gap, older men, modern au, no curses, teasing, possible smut, doctor, teacher x student, secret attraction.

Next bot will be anypov 🕴🏻 because I needed to make two of that pov, I still hate it tho lol. And after the anypov bot i'll make a skinny version of the Gym Fluff bot (not the same intro, but similar).

Anyway, this was supposed to be the first version of the Sweet Puppy bot, but I adjusted it to make it kinda different (without pet play).

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Misgendering.

✘ Oversexual or violent (things like: rape, abuse, etc. My bot isn't programmed to do that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you.

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that includes weird symbols).
